channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitics headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Putin Escalating War, Not Seeking End, Says German Chancellor Candidate Merz
item.description: German politician Friedrich Merz condemned Russia massive aerial attacks on Ukraine, saying Putin is escalating rather than seeking peace. Kyiv faced its third straight day of Russian strikes with apartment buildings flattened.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Losing Ground in Ukraine for First Time Since Kursk Incursion
item.description: Ukraine liberated more territory than Russia seized last month, marking Moscows first net loss of territory since Ukraines 2024 Kursk operation. The shift comes as Russia launched its largest aerial assault of the war.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia and UAE Carried Out Secret Attacks Inside Iran
item.description: US officials revealed that Gulf Arab states conducted covert operations in Iran, seeking to deter Iranian aggression after the war exposed limits of American security guarantees. The attacks reflect regional unease about Iranian military capabilities.

item.title: 🚢 Ship Seized Near Iran as Trump and Xi Agree Hormuz Must Stay Open
item.description: A vessel was taken toward Iranian waters while another ship sank near Oman. Trump and Xi Jinping agreed the critical Strait of Hormuz shipping lane must remain open during their Beijing summit, as China offered to help negotiate with Iran.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan wholesale inflation hits 3-year high as Iran war drives energy prices
item.description: Japanese wholesale inflation accelerated at the fastest pace in three years in April as the Iran conflict boosted oil and chemical prices, strengthening the case for a central bank rate hike as soon as June.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China halts US beef export licenses hours after Trump-Xi summit approval
item.description: Chinese customs appeared to halt export clearances for hundreds of US beef plants just hours after Reuters reported the long-awaited licenses had been approved during the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 💰 US expects double-digit billions in Chinese farm purchases after summit
item.description: The US expects China to sign up to buy double-digit billions worth of American farm goods following the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing, according to US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer.

item.title: 🇲🇦 Morocco adds B to budget to cushion Middle East conflict impact
item.description: The Moroccan government plans to add 20 billion dirhams to its 2026 budget to finance measures cushioning the impact of the Middle East conflict on the domestic market.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraq seeks IMF and World Bank financial assistance amid Iran war fallout
item.description: Iraqi officials have approached the International Monetary Fund about securing financial assistance as a result of the Middle East conflict, according to a source close to the IMF.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇵🇱 US cancels planned deployment of 4,000 troops to Poland
item.description: Pentagon scraps temporary troop deployment to Poland, surprising lawmakers and raising questions about US commitment to European defense amid Iran war tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Labour MPs question whether party will survive as political force
item.description: Labour Party faces existential crisis with support at historic lows as internal revolt engulfs Keir Starmer's leadership, raising questions about Britain's political realignment.

item.title: 🇱🇾 Football unrest triggers protests in Libyan capital
item.description: Protests erupted in Tripoli after football match tensions, with demonstrators damaging parts of the prime minister's office building.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Border Patrol chief Michael Banks resigns
item.description: The head of US Border Patrol steps down amid ongoing border security challenges and policy debates.

item.title: 🇸🇦⛪ Saudi Arabia condemns Israel over Al-Aqsa Mosque practices
item.description: Saudi foreign ministry denounces Israeli actions at Jerusalem's Al-Aqsa Mosque, calling them provocative amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇰🇪 Macron Faces Backlash in Kenya Over Africa Investment Push
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced a €23 billion investment package for Africa at the Kenya summit, but faced protests and criticism over Frances continued influence in former colonies.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Rescuers Pull Bodies From Kyiv Rubble After Massive Russian Attack
item.description: Emergency workers recovered bodies from the ruins of a flattened apartment block in Kyiv after Russia unleashed one of its largest drone barrages of the war.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary summons Russian ambassador over drone attack that entered its airspace
item.description: Hungary summoned Russia's ambassador after a massive drone attack on Ukraine included drones that entered Hungarian airspace, marking a significant diplomatic escalation as Hungary maintains close ties with Moscow.

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN humanitarian convoy hit by drone strikes in Ukraine's Kherson
item.description: A UN aid convoy delivering humanitarian assistance to Kherson was struck by drone attacks, highlighting the dangers faced by relief operations in conflict zones.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran urges BRICS to condemn US and Israel, Indian-flagged vessel sunk
item.description: Iran's foreign minister called on BRICS nations to condemn violations of international law by the US and Israel, while reports emerged of an Indian-flagged vessel being sunk amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇦🇪 Iran and UAE clash at BRICS foreign ministers meeting in Delhi
item.description: Iran's foreign minister accused the UAE of direct involvement in military operations against Iran during a BRICS meeting, escalating diplomatic tensions between Gulf states.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India seeks US waiver extension for Russian oil imports amid Iran war
item.description: India has asked the U.S. to extend its waiver allowing purchases of Russian oil, Bloomberg reported, as the ongoing conflict in the Persian Gulf disrupts traditional energy supply routes.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian government collapses over Ukraine drone incident response
item.description: Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned Thursday, triggering coalition collapse months before October elections, amid criticism of her handling of airspace violations by Ukrainian drones during Russian attacks.

item.title: 🛢️ Gazprom halts fuel output at Russian plant after drone strike
item.description: Gazproms Astrakhan gas processing plant stopped motor fuel production following a fire from a May 13 drone attack, highlighting the reach of aerial warfare into Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo criticizes surge in European military spending as diplomacy betrayal
item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced rising European defense budgets that grew by the highest amount since the Cold War, saying the investment in high-tech weaponry over peace efforts represents a betrayal of diplomacy.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇮🇶 Türkiye Backs Iraq New Government Led by PM Al-Zaidi
item.description: Ankara expressed support for Iraq new administration, hoping it will strengthen regional stability and prosperity, reaffirming close cooperation between the two neighbors.
